title: arenaria fendleri var. aculeata
intro: Arenaria fendleri var. aculeata, also known as prickly sandwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its high content of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of prickly sandwort include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Arenaria fendleri var. aculeata can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the plant's roots and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
